steps: In an autoclaved bottle add 2.5ml of 1M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 solution 1M Tris-HCl by Sarah Hessen-Schmidt
Add 200ml 100% EtOH Ethyl alcohol, Pure 200 proof, for molecular biology Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #E7023
Adjust volume to 250ml by adding 47.5ml MilliQ
